name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects/month, compliance gaps cause potential OSHA penalties. We automate the preparation of safety compliance checklists instead of manual checklist preparation and tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in maintaining OSHA safety compliance across multiple projects.
